## Summary

<!-- What and why -->

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run lint` passes
- [ ] `npm run test:unit` passes
- [ ] A11y impact considered (`npm run audit:a11y` if UI changed)
- [ ] Store/privacy impact considered if permissions or data handling changed
- [ ] No credentials/telemetry added
- [ ] Docs/wiki updated if user-facing behavior changed
